projectDescription: This project was created during a job interview. A simulation to model and analyze traffic accidents. By placing vehicles on a virtual board, we can study collision dynamics and their impact on road safety. This project aims to provide insights for accident prevention and improve safety measures on highways.

This project was created during a job interview. A web application to manage traffic interventions. It allows users to create, update, and delete interventions, as well as view intervention history and generate reports. The application is built with React and uses a REST API for data management.

A social network made by gamers for gamers. A place where you can find people to play with, share your achievements, and connect with other players. The application is built with Angular and uses a REST API for data management made in Laravel. You can create your game lists, write reviews, make posts, comment, and more. You can also find people to play with by searching for their favorite games.
